message:
feat(ftui): re-export locale API from main crate

Expose the new locale integration through the top-level ftui crate:

- Locale, LocaleContext, LocaleOverride types
- current_locale(), detect_system_locale(), set_locale() functions

This allows users to configure i18n via `use ftui::{Locale, set_locale}`
rather than importing from ftui_runtime directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
